description: Welcome home to this modern 3-bedroom + den townhouse offering stylish, functional living. Designed with an open-concept layout, the home features quartz countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a bright, airy living space perfect for everyday life or entertaining. Enjoy the bonus of an extra flex room on the ground floor—ideal for a home office or gym. With 2 full bathrooms, 1 half bathroom, newer washer and dryer, and a backyard finished with low-maintenance artificial turf, comfort meets convenience. Rare parking for up to 4 vehicles and a central location make this 7-year-old home a standout opportunity.
